rules.requirement: Authenticated application work uses an approved target profile, shell, and layout archetype.
evidence: rendered state or receipt when applicable
rules.remediation: Fix the implementation or record an accepted, unexpired exception before verification can pass.
rules.exceptionPolicy: Requires accepted exception with rule ID, reason, owner, scope, accessibility impact, and expiration.
